evals.name: schema_design
evals.prompt: Design the database schema for our e-commerce order management system
expectations: Includes entity-relationship model with cardinality
Covers normalization analysis with denormalization justification
Addresses naming conventions and constraint design
Includes data type selection with storage implications

evals.name: indexing_strategy
evals.prompt: Plan an indexing strategy for our PostgreSQL database with slow read queries
expectations: Identifies appropriate index types (B-tree, GIN, BRIN)
Covers composite and covering indexes
Includes index maintenance and bloat monitoring
Recommends EXPLAIN ANALYZE validation approach

evals.name: partitioning_sharding
evals.prompt: We have a 500GB table growing 10GB/month. Design a partitioning strategy
expectations: Evaluates range vs list vs hash partitioning
Addresses partition pruning for query performance
Covers partition maintenance and archival
Includes sharding considerations if single-node insufficient

evals.name: zero_downtime_migration
evals.prompt: Plan a zero-downtime migration to rename columns and change types in production
expectations: Uses expand-contract or dual-write pattern
Includes rollback strategy with time window
Covers data backfill with batch processing
Addresses backward compatibility during transition

evals.name: replication_ha
evals.prompt: Set up replication and high availability for our financial transaction database
expectations: Evaluates sync vs async replication for financial data
Defines RPO and RTO targets
Covers failover strategy with automatic promotion
Includes read replica lag monitoring and routing
